title: An Act to Address Conflicts of Interest with Municipal Contracts
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, May 21, 2025
last_house_action: 4/10/2025 - Committee on State and Local Government suggested and ordered printed. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on STATE AND LOCAL GOVERNMENT . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 5/21/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
